title: Improved Villagers
description: adds new villager professions, better trades, and new items to your world
body:
This mod adds better villager trades and new villagers, currently there are only a few things added:

# Improved trades
## Skilled farmer
![skilled farmer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4574a31f1b480053baa1683723a417acb8291fd0_0.webp)
![skilled farmer trades](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea7ac8fca892db7d66a9de139dbd9b01aa56a56c_0.webp)
# New Villagers

## Necromancer
![necromancer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43dbac1551c6bea7ddf796954f152ced74dff585_0.webp)

(Current design is just a place holder)
## Emerald Master
![emerald master](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd2097c8028a7405fa6e721d0f39b526a0ae5082_0.webp)
# Items added
## Farming table
used to get access to the new skilled farmer
## Super Emerald
9 emerald blocks put into one to make an advanced trading station
## Soul
used in trading to get spawn eggs
